inline_comments.message: Remove this duplicate verification - check my comment below
Remove this duplicate verification - check my comment below

There is no need to concatenate params in the url like this. get()/post() etc methods rely on templates. Check the signature in javadoc. All you need to do is pass the url as a complete template get("/mso_get_man_task/{originalRequestId}", originalRequestId). The get method accepts varags for the params. A lot cleaner.

Do not verify invocations of methods for which you previously record expected behavior. The Given section is a verification in itself - if the given manualTasks object is not return - the test will fail.
